meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle as a founder. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch high-value SaaS MVPs rapidly.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap kills founder momentum. You don't need years of work; you need a high-velocity launch. By leveraging the Antigravity project template combined with Claude Code, you can deploy a professional-grade SaaS MVP in hours, turning your vision into a live, revenue-generating asset that proves your technical execution.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the weight of 'no portfolio' pressing against your ambitions. Every potential investor or customer asks for proof, and you have nothing but a vision. The market doesn't care about your resume; it cares about your output. 

Stop waiting for the perfect moment. By shifting from 'building a portfolio' to 'shipping a product,' you bypass the traditional gatekeepers. Using the Antigravity template and Claude Code, you will transform your conceptual idea into a production-ready SaaS, effectively building your reputation through tangible, profitable code.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-grade foundation. This prevents 'tutorial hell' and gives you a professional structure immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity boilerplate. Configure with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Your Revenue Model
steps.description: Implement authentication and payment logic early to ensure your project is monetizable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Stripe integration and user authentication flows to the current project structure.

steps.title: Build the Core Value Prop
steps.description: Focus on the single feature that solves your user's primary pain point to ensure rapid validation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard view that allows users to interact with the core AI service defined in our roadmap.

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Set up CI/CD so your project is always live and ready for stakeholders to inspect.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel-compatible deployment pipeline with automated testing scripts.

steps.title: Polish and Ship
steps.description: Perform final QA and SEO optimization to ensure your MVP looks professional and ranks for your niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the codebase for performance bottlenecks and optimize SEO meta tags for all landing pages.

pro_tips: Treat your MVP code as a disposable asset; focus on speed-to-market rather than perfect architecture.
Use Claude Code to document your build process as you go—this becomes your 'technical case study' for potential hires.
Prioritize a 'Buy' button over a 'Portfolio' page; revenue is the ultimate proof of skill.
Always wrap your AI interactions in a caching layer to keep API costs low and performance high.
If a feature takes more than 4 hours to implement, it is likely bloat; cut it and focus on the core user loop.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, share the link with 5 potential users, gather feedback, and iterate your feature set based on actual usage metrics.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for your resume and start building for your bank account. The market is waiting for your solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
